projects.title: Merge Mansion
projects.description: One of the world's top-grossing merge games. Contracted to design levels for live events and core game progression.
responsibilities: Designed and balanced levels for live events and core game progression, working within established design frameworks and pipelines
Contributed to Game Design and Game Balance across active content updates for a top-grossing mobile title
achievements: Contributed to one of the world's top-grossing merge games

projects.title: Realm of the Mad God
projects.description: Senior Game Design across DECA's live portfolio of acquired titles, managing live operations and feature design for Realm of the Mad God.
responsibilities: Provided Senior Game Design across DECA's live portfolio of acquired titles, shaping feature direction and content strategy
Managed live operations and feature design for Realm of the Mad God, a long-running MMO with a dedicated player base
Optimized live ops event structures to improve player engagement and retention across update cycles
achievements: Optimized live ops events for higher player engagement

projects.title: Lead Level Designer
projects.description: Coordinated 6 teams to produce and deliver levels for multiple King puzzle games. Responsible for King's partnership and day-to-day project coordination, planning, and delivery for level content.
responsibilities: Led 6 concurrent level design teams across multiple King puzzle titles, coordinating daily delivery schedules and cross-team dependencies
Owned the King partnership end-to-end, acted as the primary point of contact between Amber and King's studio leads
Managed a cumulative headcount of 15 designers, running standups, reviews, and milestone planning across all active projects
Trained 9 Junior Level Designers from onboarding to production-ready, building a structured training pipeline that scaled with team growth
Personally produced over 2,500+ levels while guiding teams to a combined output exceeding 10,000 levels across all projects
Standardized Level Design procedures and centralized shared resources into a unified knowledge base used across all teams
Completed internal Leadership Training programs focused on people management, conflict resolution, and cross-functional coordination
Mentored 1 university student through a Game Design internship, guiding them from academic theory to hands-on production work
achievements: Managed 6 concurrent teams while maintaining delivery quality and production velocity

projects.title: Formula E High Voltage
projects.description: Developed by Animoca Brands, the game integrates with the broader REVV token ecosystem and features Cars and Drivers as NFTs, enabling players to manage their own Formula E teams.
responsibilities: Oversaw the design of all core gameplay features, ensuring each system aligned with the blockchain integration and REVV token economy
Designed the game's major systems from scratch: Game Modes, Team Management, AI Manager Personas, Attack Zone and Energy Regen mechanics, and Circuit Track research
Created the full game screen flow diagram and collaborated closely with UX and UI teams to shape an intuitive player experience
Worked alongside the Game Economy Designer to validate, stress-test, and balance all proposed game values before implementation
Researched the real Formula E sport in depth to ensure gameplay mechanics maintained high fidelity to the actual racing format
achievements: Integrated NFT Cars and Drivers as playable team management assets

projects.title: Tap TD
projects.description: Tap TD combines an addictive idle gameplay with the complexity of tower defense. Produced independently in partnership with 3 former King employees.
responsibilities: Produced the full game independently in partnership with 3 former King employees, owning every aspect of the project from concept to launch
Led project planning, team coordination, and backlog management across the entire development cycle
Created all Game Design documentation including systems specs, balancing sheets, and feature proposals
Designed all tower defense maps and level progression, balancing difficulty curves across dozens of stages
Designed the full UX flow from first-time user experience through endgame loops
Balanced all Enemy and Tower stats, tuning damage, HP, and cost curves to maintain strategic depth
Designed the monetization strategy including IAP structure, ad placements, and premium unlocks
Created the game's story, lore, and visual branding from scratch
Managed the game's Reddit community, responding to player feedback and incorporating it into design updates
Produced YouTube content including gameplay videos, dev vlogs, and promotional trailers

projects.title: Lucky Slots & Friends
projects.description: Newton Slots has a unique take on Slot games, introducing the option to interact with elements on the screen. A Slots + Match-3 hybrid.
responsibilities: Re-designed a Slots game by introducing Match-3 mechanics, creating a first-of-its-kind hybrid interaction model
Researched and documented the Swapping mechanic, defining its rules, edge cases, and interaction patterns
Designed new Bonus Games mechanics that added variety and replayability to the core slot loop
Coordinated the implementation of all design features with the development team, ensuring spec fidelity
Balanced the games payout reward formula, tuning win rates and prize distribution to meet retention targets
Designed the Loot Box system including drop tables, rarity tiers, and reward progression
achievements: Innovative Spin Mechanic, a first-of-kind Slots + Match-3 hybrid interaction

projects.title: Clash of Towers
projects.description: An indie game produced and launched on the Google Play Store in just 2 months, coordinated fully online.
responsibilities: Produced and launched an indie mobile game on the Google Play Store within a 2-month timeline from concept to release
Coordinated a remote team of 3 people across different time zones, managing tasks and deliverables fully online
Designed all game graphics and the in-game economy, handling both the visual identity and the progression balance

projects.title: FitKin
projects.description: FitKin is a gamified app designed to encourage users to live a healthy lifestyle. Users advance the story's progress by tracking their steps in the real world.
responsibilities: Collaborated with a team of 8 people across design, development, and QA to deliver a gamified health app
Wrote all Game Design documentation including feature specs, system rules, and progression design
Designed game scenes and narrative progression that tied physical activity to in-game story advancement
Prototyped new features in rapid iteration cycles, testing mechanics before committing to full implementation
Classified users into behavioral Personas based on research, tailoring the experience to different motivation profiles
Conducted User Behavior research to understand how players engaged with fitness-driven game mechanics
Organized and ran User Testing events to validate design assumptions with real players

projects.title: Castellum
projects.description: Contracted to design and produce an idle brawler game for a client. Managed the full production cycle including client communication.
responsibilities: Contracted to design and produce a complete idle brawler game, owning the project from initial brief through delivery
Managed a team of 4 people, assigning tasks and tracking progress across design, art, and development
Gathered client feedback through regular update calls, iterating on the design based on evolving requirements
Authored the full Game Design Document covering mechanics, progression, economy, and content structure
Handled UX and UI Design, creating wireframes and screen flows for the complete player journey
Produced promotional videos for the client to use in marketing and investor presentations
achievements: Delivered a complete game to a freelance client

projects.title: Bubble Witch Saga
projects.description: One of King's founding hits. Started as Jr. Level Designer learning core Level Design principles.
responsibilities: Joined King as a Jr. Level Designer on Bubble Witch Saga, one of the studio's founding mobile hits
Designed and balanced levels for the live game, learning King's proprietary level design tools and quality standards
Built a foundation in core Level Design principles including difficulty curves, player psychology, and puzzle pacing
achievements: Contributed to one of King's founding hits

projects.title: AlphaBetty Saga
projects.description: AlphaBetty Saga is a unique match-3 puzzle game that replaces colored candies with letters. Link letters to create Words & Blasters! Ranked as the Top 5th Word game in the world.
responsibilities: Promoted to Level Designer on AlphaBetty Saga, a word-puzzle game that reached the Top 5 Word games worldwide
Designed in-game tutorials that onboarded new players into the game's unique letter-linking mechanics
Trained 1 Junior Level Designer, mentoring them through the full production workflow
Maintained and updated project documentation to keep design specs aligned with live content changes
Delivered presentations across multiple King studios, sharing level design insights and best practices
Participated in King's internal growth programs focused on design leadership and cross-studio collaboration
achievements: Shipped a live King title reaching millions of players

projects.title: Newgrounds Flash Games
projects.description: Designed, developed, and published 20+ Flash games and tutorials on Newgrounds across multiple genres. Handled all aspects of game creation from design to release.
responsibilities: Designed, developed, and published 20+ Flash games and tutorials on Newgrounds, spanning shooters, puzzles, platformers, and experimental genres
Handled every aspect of game creation solo: game design, pixel art, animation, ActionScript programming, testing, and release
Built a public portfolio of shipped titles during formative years, developing the full-stack game development instincts that informed all later career work
achievements: Built a portfolio of 20+ published Flash games across multiple genres

projects.title: Bounzy
projects.description: A zombie shooter built around a bouncing bullet mechanic. Classic Flash era game with massive web reach.
responsibilities: Designed the core bouncing bullet mechanic for a zombie shooter, creating a physics-driven combat loop that rewarded trick shots
Created all game art, animations, and visual effects, defining the game's visual identity from scratch
achievements: Classic Flash era game with massive web reach

projects.title: Marble Frenzy 2
projects.description: A Match-3 marble breaking game with innovative hybrid mechanics. Second installment of the Marble Frenzy series.
responsibilities: Designed the core Match-3 marble breaking mechanics, evolving the formula from the first Marble Frenzy with new chain reactions and power-ups
Created all visual assets and tuned the game feel, ensuring the puzzle interactions felt satisfying and readable at speed
